name: Advanced Biomed Inc.
summary: PART I Overview and Recent Developments We are a holding company incorporated in the State of Nevada. We operate through Advanced Biomed Taiwan and Advanced Biomed HK. Advanced Biomed Taiwan is responsible for the main operation and the design and development of the companys primary technologies and products.
